subject: Re:
body:
I don't know the divorce rules of dubai

----- Original Message ----
From: Cecilia Steen <cecilia.steen@gmail.com>
To: JE <jeeproject@yahoo.com>
Sent: Thursday, February 1, 2007 5:41:49 AM
Subject: 

Hey dearest Jeffrey!

Sorry I've been MIA for so long, but I've had no internet connection at home for the past week and am still working on it.

 

Thank you for letter of recommendation. I received it. 

 

The asset mgt firm I REALLY wanted to join has been crossed out from my list b/c one of the partners is REALLY interested in me - like really. He will probably be the best boyfriend I've ever had, but for the price of a job I wanted more than anything. 


 

Considering the type of response I'm getting at my interviews, it really would be easier for me to get a husband than a job. I would probably be better off financially in a divorce as well...  



Lots of love,
-- 
Cecilia Steen
Dubai Mobile +971 50 940 2062
